title: FIN Bridge Result Envelope
description: The agent's answer to one command, sent up inside a poll-request. Agent -> server. Correlated only by id (it rides a different HTTP request than the command delivery). A result whose id the server has already tombstoned is discarded, never re-applied.

id.title: Command Id
id.description: Echoes the id of the command this result answers. The only correlation; HTTP request pairing cannot be used.

ok.title: Success Flag
ok.description: True for success (payload present, error absent); false for failure (error present, payload absent).

payload.title: Success Payload
payload.description: Operation-specific success data. Write operations include both before and after state so the effect of a mutation is visible to the model and operator. Shape per-operation is owned by #20.
